title: KAPP-Sen TMC: Xenium Pancreas FFPE Tissue Preparation
steps: Xenium In Situ for FFPE - Tissue Preparation Guide CG000578 Rev C : CG000578_Demonstrated_Protocol_XeniumInSituProtocolsFFPE_TissuePreparationGuide_Rev_C.pdf The optimal water bath temperature for pancreas tissue was determined to be 38 C (see page 22 of CG000578 Rev C).
